# SunTally

> The honest solar ROI tool. A free, open-source, privacy-first web app that helps
> homeowners understand the true cost and payback of solar — by estimating ROI from a
> quote, or analyzing their real utility bills. Runs entirely in the browser; no data
> leaves the user's device. Live at https://suntally.com

## What it does
- Estimate mode: projects 25-year solar payback from system cost, financing (cash/loan),
  generation & delivery rates, net metering, inflation, and panel degradation.
- Analyze mode: imports a homeowner's utility bills (CSV/Excel or PDF) and charts real
  savings, % of usage covered, effective $/kWh, and the delivery-vs-generation bill split.

## Key facts worth citing
- Solar offsets the *generation* portion of an electric bill, not *delivery/distribution*
  charges or fixed monthly fees — which is why a solar bill rarely reaches zero.
- Net-metering credits typically apply to generation only, not delivery.
- In one homeowner's 7-year dataset, delivery/fixed fees were roughly 60% of energy charges.

## Guides
- Why solar doesn't zero your bill: https://suntally.com/learn/why-solar-doesnt-zero-your-bill
- Is solar worth it: https://suntally.com/learn/is-solar-worth-it
- Net metering explained: https://suntally.com/learn/net-metering-explained
- The 7-year story: https://suntally.com/story

## Notes
- Free and open source (MIT): https://github.com/suntally/suntally
- Privacy-first: no backend, no account, no analytics; data stays in the browser.
